title: Excel Reports - Automated Table Addition, Column Sizing, and Currency Value On Columns That Contain "$" Within The Board
excerpt: When generating Excel Reports, could auto-sizing of columns take place as well as auto-tabling of the rows/columns as branded rows with the option to deselect branded rows so that data is simpler to review? Also, could c…

posts.author: andrewst (Tyler Andrews)
posts.cookedHtml:
When generating Excel Reports, could auto-sizing of columns take place as well as auto-tabling of the rows/columns as branded rows with the option to deselect branded rows so that data is simpler to review? Also, could columns and any column summaries that contain “$” automatically be setup as a currency value with “$” signs in the reports?

Sometimes we use exported Excel sheets instead of Dashboards to review/report certain information.
